_comment: Cowork web_fetch host allowlist required by this plugin's sub-agents. Sync to your Cowork runtime configuration. The runtime's host allowlist is external to this repo (lives in the user's Cowork session settings); this file documents the required hosts so it can be re-applied after a Cowork reset or by a new operator.
_provenance: F-311 (2026-05-11): microstructure sub-agent's required-citation schema was failing with egress_blocked on the 6 hosts below. Cowork allowlist expansion was the chosen fix path (vs Modal-runtime port or Polygon-only rewrite).

hosts.purpose: Equity options chain snapshots + IV history for tickers without Polygon coverage; complements mcp__polygon-mcp__get_iv when Polygon data is stale.
Pre-market and after-hours quote context; volume profile by exchange.
Institutional 13F holdings & changes for the target ticker (microstructure regime context).
Short interest, options flow heatmaps, dark pool prints.
Borrow availability + rebate rates; required for shorting-feasibility annotations.

apply_steps: 1. Open your Cowork session settings (or .claude/settings.local.json for this project).
2. Add each host above to the web_fetch / WebFetch allowlist (key name varies by Cowork version — look for 'allowed_hosts', 'web_fetch.hosts', or equivalent).
3. Restart the Cowork drain skill for fda_agent_reviews so the allowlist change takes effect.
UPDATE public.fda_agent_reviews SET status='queued', ran_at=NULL, error_message=NULL WHERE status='failed' AND error_message LIKE 'egress_blocked%';
